positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_problem
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    susan != john).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    ~flies_from(X0,X1) | ~flies_to(X0,X1)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~flies_to(john,lga)).

cnf(u14,negated_conjecture,
    ~flies_from(susan,lga)).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    flies_from(john,lga)).

cnf(u10,axiom,
    flies_to(susan,lga)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg_problem
% SZS output start Proof for neg_problem
1. flies_to(susan,lga) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0,X1] : ((flies_from(X0,X1) & flies_to(X0,X1)) => $false) [input(axiom)]
5. ~flies_from(susan,lga) [input(conjecture)]
6. ~~flies_from(susan,lga) [negated conjecture 5]
7. ! [X0,X1] : ~(flies_from(X0,X1) & flies_to(X0,X1)) [true and false elimination 3]
8. flies_from(susan,lga) [flattening 6]
9. ! [X0,X1] : (~flies_from(X0,X1) | ~flies_to(X0,X1)) [ennf transformation 7]
10. flies_to(susan,lga) [cnf transformation 1]
12. ~flies_from(X0,X1) | ~flies_to(X0,X1) [cnf transformation 9]
14. flies_from(susan,lga) [cnf transformation 8]
15. ~flies_to(susan,lga) [resolution 12,14]
17. $false [forward subsumption resolution 15,10]
% SZS output end Proof for neg_problem
% Termination reason: Refutation
